description_long: This object is a futuristic, compact airplane with a robust, angular fuselage and a predominantly gray, mottled exterior reminiscent of military or sci-fi aesthetics. The nose is rounded and opaque white, suggesting a reinforced or sensor-laden cockpit area, while the main body features intricate surface detailing and paneling. The wings are mid-mounted, swept back, and relatively short, with additional stabilizing fins or canards near the front and rear, giving the craft a distinctive, aggressive profile. At the rear, three prominent circular engine nozzles emit a faint blue glow, indicating powerful jet or rocket propulsion. The tail section is integrated into the fuselage with no distinct vertical stabilizer, and the landing gear is not visible, possibly indicating a retractable or concealed design. The overall appearance suggests a high-performance, possibly unmanned or advanced piloted aircraft suited for rapid maneuvering in urban or combat environments.
description: A compact, futuristic airplane with a mottled gray exterior, swept mid-mounted wings, and three glowing rear engines. The rounded white nose and intricate surface details give it a high-tech, aggressive look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded white nose, mid-mounted swept wings, and detailed fuselage surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated fuselage, short swept wings, and the opaque cockpit area.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals three glowing blue engine nozzles and the integrated tail section with no vertical stabilizer.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the fuselage profile and wing configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with swept wings and additional forward and rear stabilizing fins; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Triple rear-mounted jet engines with circular nozzles.
attribute_tail_design: Integrated tail with no distinct vertical stabilizer, featuring horizontal stabilizing surfaces.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; likely retractable or concealed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with an opaque, rounded canopy.
